task_completion.description: Create a new item in Juris-M with the type 'Dictionary Entry'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M interface, the right-hand info pane should display 'Item Type' as 'Dictionary Entry', or the middle pane should show the dictionary entry icon next to the new item.

task_completion.description: Set the Title of the entry to 'Stare Decisis'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' field in the right-hand info pane of Juris-M contains the text 'Stare Decisis'.

task_completion.description: Set the Dictionary Title to 'Black's Law Dictionary'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Dictionary Title' field in the right-hand info pane contains the text 'Black's Law Dictionary'.

task_completion.description: Add Bryan A. Garner as the Editor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The creator field in the right-hand info pane shows 'Garner, Bryan A.' or 'Bryan A. Garner' and the role dropdown next to it is specifically set to 'Editor' (not 'Author').

task_completion.description: Set the Date to 2019 and the Edition to 11th
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Date' field contains '2019' and the 'Edition' field contains '11th' in the right-hand info pane.

task_completion.description: Set the Publisher to Thomson Reuters
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Publisher' field in the right-hand info pane contains the text 'Thomson Reuters'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Juris-M graphical user interface to create the entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Juris-M application window being actively used, rather than a script, terminal, or text editor.

integrity.description: The entry is actually saved and visible in the Juris-M library list.
integrity.visual_evidence: The middle pane of the Juris-M window shows 'Stare Decisis' listed among the library items, indicating it was properly saved.

integrity.description: The agent did not use SQLite or database browsers to inject the data directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows running sqlite3 commands or DB Browser for SQLite applications are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a dictionary entry for the real legal term 'Stare Decisis'. The expected metadata matches real-world facts: Dictionary Title is 'Black's Law Dictionary', Editor is 'Bryan A. Garner', Date is '2019', Edition is '11th', and Publisher is 'Thomson Reuters'.
